resources

here for the useful version? this page skips most of the side quests.

for game studios

i’m moving into game development through C#, game-system experiments, interaction work, and the Imposter party-game project. i’m especially interested in gameplay systems, tools, backend support, and understanding how real teams ship and maintain games.

Game Lab Imposter Devlog GitHub

for software teams

my software work includes backend automation, desktop applications, graph algorithms, data visualization, APIs, databases, and product tooling. i like projects where i can understand the whole path from data to interface.

Projects LinkedIn

quick facts

  • Location: İzmit, Kocaeli, Türkiye
  • Origin: Tripoli, Libya
  • Education: BSc Computer Engineering, Kocaeli University
  • Graduation: 2028 expected
  • Current direction: Game development + software engineering

contact

open to game-development internships, software internships, technical collaborations, and projects where i can learn from a real team while being genuinely useful.

Email LinkedIn
